name: codex-questforge
description: A 5E-compatible Codex plugin for running persistent fantasy campaigns with auto-language SRD setup, structured local rules resources, campaign memory, a mechanical game-state ledger, adventure spines, puzzle beats, dice resolution, self-play, visual planning, native scene image generation, 360 viewers, a local visual gallery, and pre-beta campaign audits.

interface.shortDescription: Run rich 5E-compatible fantasy campaigns with Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Questforge helps Codex act as a grounded fantasy campaign runner: it detects the user's language for SRD setup, prepares structured local rules resources, keeps campaign memory, maintains a player-facing mechanical ledger for inventory, equipment, shops, HP, resources, level-ups, combat, death, and rollback, maintains DM-only adventure spines, designs non-blocking puzzle beats, adjudicates play with SRD-compatible rules, resolves dice, plans consequential visuals, saves visual prompts, refreshes a local image gallery, opens 360 viewers, audits campaign readiness before human beta play, and supports deterministic self-play checks.
